daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Aries. You're radiating that main character energy—use it to have those conversations you've been putting off. The vibe is direct but kind.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, quality time hits different today. Single? Someone's been lowkey thinking about you. Don't overthink the signs; just show up authentically and let things unfold naturally.
daily.career: Your ideas are actually gold right now. Speak up in that meeting or send that email you drafted three times. Your confidence paired with genuine effort creates real momentum today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—whether that's a walk, a workout, or just dancing in your room. Channel that fiery Aries energy into something that makes you feel alive and grounded.

weekly.overview: This week's giving main character energy, Aries. You're stepping into your power with renewed clarity and honestly? It's time. The cosmos is basically handing you permission to be unapologetically yourself. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing you. Whether that's new or familiar doesn't matter—the vibe shift is real. If you're coupled up, this is your moment to have those conversations you've been putting off. Vulnerability is actually attractive rn.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Speak up in that meeting. The timing feels awkward but it's actually perfect. A collaboration or partnership could open doors you didn't even know existed. Keep your eyes open.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and sunlight. Even just a walk counts. Sleep might feel off early in the week but it normalizes by Thursday. Stay hydrated—seriously, your skin will thank you.
